functions.name: addCatchAllRoute
functions.description: Adds a YARP catch-all route for an existing cluster.

functions.name: addCatchAllRouteFromEndpoint
functions.description: Adds a YARP catch-all route for an endpoint reference.

functions.name: addCatchAllRouteFromExternalService
functions.description: Adds a YARP catch-all route for an external service resource.

functions.name: addCatchAllRouteFromResource
functions.description: Adds a YARP catch-all route for a resource that supports service discovery.

functions.name: addClusterFromEndpoint
functions.description: Adds a YARP cluster for an endpoint reference.

functions.name: addClusterFromExternalService
functions.description: Adds a YARP cluster for an external service resource.

functions.name: addClusterFromResource
functions.description: Adds a YARP cluster for a resource that supports service discovery.

functions.name: addClusterWithDestination
functions.description: Adds a YARP cluster with a single destination.

functions.name: addClusterWithDestinations
functions.description: Adds a YARP cluster with multiple destinations.

functions.name: addRouteFromEndpoint
functions.description: Adds a YARP route for an endpoint reference.

functions.name: addRouteFromExternalService
functions.description: Adds a YARP route for an external service resource.

functions.name: addRouteFromResource
functions.description: Adds a YARP route for a resource that supports service discovery.

functions.name: addYarp
functions.description: Adds a YARP container to the application model.

functions.name: addRoute
functions.description: Invokes the AddRoute method

functions.name: publishWithStaticFiles
functions.description: In publish mode, generates a Dockerfile that copies static files from the specified resource into /app/wwwroot.

functions.name: withConfiguration
functions.description: Configure the YARP resource.

functions.name: withForwarderRequestConfig
functions.description: Sets the forwarder request configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withHealthCheckConfig
functions.description: Sets the health check configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withHostHttpsPort
functions.description: Configures the host HTTPS port that the YARP resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the YARP resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

functions.name: withHttpClientConfig
functions.description: Sets the HTTP client configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withLoadBalancingPolicy
functions.description: Sets the load balancing policy for the cluster.

functions.name: withMatch
functions.description: Sets the route match criteria.

functions.name: withMatchHeaders
functions.description: Matches requests that contain the specified headers.

functions.name: withMatchHosts
functions.description: Matches requests that contain the specified host headers.

functions.name: withMatchMethods
functions.description: Matches requests that use the specified HTTP methods.

functions.name: withMatchPath
functions.description: Matches requests with the specified path pattern.

functions.name: withMatchRouteQueryParameter
functions.description: Matches requests that contain the specified query parameters.

functions.name: withMaxRequestBodySize
functions.description: Sets the maximum request body size for the route.

functions.name: withMetadata
functions.description: Sets metadata for the cluster.

functions.name: withMetadata
functions.description: Sets metadata for the route.

functions.name: withOrder
functions.description: Sets the route order.

functions.name: withSessionAffinityConfig
functions.description: Sets the session affinity configuration for the cluster.

functions.name: withStaticFiles
functions.description: Enables static file serving in the YARP resource. Static files are served from the wwwroot folder.

functions.name: withTransform
functions.description: Adds a transform to the route.

functions.name: withTransformClientCertHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will set the given header with the Base64 encoded client certificate.

functions.name: withTransformCopyRequestHeaders
functions.description: Adds the transform which will enable or suppress copying request headers to the proxy request.

functions.name: withTransformCopyResponseHeaders
functions.description: Adds the transform which will enable or suppress copying response headers to the client response.

functions.name: withTransformCopyResponseTrailers
functions.description: Adds the transform which will enable or suppress copying response trailers to the client response.

functions.name: withTransformForwarded
functions.description: Adds the transform which will add the Forwarded header as defined by [RFC 7239](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7239).
functions.signature: withTransformForwarded(useHost?: boolean, useProto?: boolean, forFormat?: NodeFormat, byFormat?: NodeFormat, action?: ForwardedTransformActions): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformHttpMethodChange
functions.description: Adds the transform that will replace the HTTP method if it matches.

functions.name: withTransformPathPrefix
functions.description: Adds the transform which will prefix the request path with the given value.

functions.name: withTransformPathRemovePrefix
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the matching prefix from the request path.

functions.name: withTransformPathRouteValues
functions.description: Adds the transform which will set the request path with route values.

functions.name: withTransformPathSet
functions.description: Adds the transform which sets the request path with the given value.

functions.name: withTransformQueryRemoveKey
functions.description: Adds the transform that will remove the given query key.

functions.name: withTransformQueryRouteValue
functions.description: Adds the transform that will append or set the query parameter from a route value.
functions.signature: withTransformQueryRouteValue(queryKey: string, routeValueKey: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformQueryValue
functions.description: Adds the transform that will append or set the query parameter from the given value.
functions.signature: withTransformQueryValue(queryKey: string, value: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the request header.
functions.signature: withTransformRequestHeader(headerName: string, value: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeaderRemove
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the request header.

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeaderRouteValue
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the request header from a route value.
functions.signature: withTransformRequestHeaderRouteValue(headerName: string, routeValueKey: string, append?: boolean): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformRequestHeadersAllowed
functions.description: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed request headers. Other transforms

functions.name: withTransformResponseHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the response header.
functions.signature: withTransformResponseHeader(headerName: string, value: string, append?: boolean, condition?: ResponseCondition): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformResponseHeaderRemove
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the response header.

functions.name: withTransformResponseHeadersAllowed
functions.description: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed response headers. Other transforms

functions.name: withTransformResponseTrailer
functions.description: Adds the transform which will append or set the response trailer.
functions.signature: withTransformResponseTrailer(headerName: string, value: string, append?: boolean, condition?: ResponseCondition): YarpRoute

functions.name: withTransformResponseTrailerRemove
functions.description: Adds the transform which will remove the response trailer.

functions.name: withTransformResponseTrailersAllowed
functions.description: Adds the transform which will only copy the allowed response trailers. Other transforms

functions.name: withTransforms
functions.description: Sets the transforms for the route.

functions.name: withTransformUseOriginalHostHeader
functions.description: Adds the transform which will copy the incoming request Host header to the proxy request.

functions.name: withTransformXForwarded
functions.description: Adds the transform which will add X-Forwarded-* headers.
functions.signature: withTransformXForwarded(headerPrefix?: string, xDefault?: ForwardedTransformActions, xFor?: ForwardedTransformActions, xHost?: ForwardedTransformActions, xProto?: ForwardedTransformActions, xPrefix?: ForwardedTransformActions): YarpRoute
